decision.stop_condition_state: no R6 hard stop; nominal and pessimistic named regimes preserve the bounded promoted EDP claim
decision.valid_regime_statement: The promoted claim is valid for the nominal, optimistic, and pessimistic named R6 regimes. One-at-a-time, combined-stress, and stacked-boundary sweeps are boundary evidence and are not promoted as realistic operating regimes.
